name: kwai_scraper
title: Kwai Scraper
description: Retrieve public Kwai creator profiles, creator posts, and individual post metadata without login.

seo.title: Kwai Scraper API for Profiles and Videos
seo.description: Retrieve structured public Kwai creator profiles, creator video listings, and individual post metadata for agents.
seo.intro: Kwai Scraper reads Kwai's public server-rendered creator and video pages. It normalizes profile stats, bios, post identifiers, captions, views, thumbnails, engagement, and public media URLs without requiring account credentials.

useCases.title: Creator research
useCases.description: Resolve a public Kwai creator to follower, following, and like labels plus bio, avatar, and verification state.

useCases.title: Video monitoring
useCases.description: List a creator's recent public video IDs, captions, view labels, thumbnails, and canonical URLs.

useCases.title: Post enrichment
useCases.description: Turn a Kwai video URL into normalized caption, engagement, publication, thumbnail, and media metadata.

faqs.question: Does this require Kwai login?
faqs.answer: No. The implemented modes use public Kwai creator and video pages.

faqs.question: Does it download videos?
faqs.answer: No. It returns public metadata and the media URL when Kwai exposes one.

faqs.question: Are private creators supported?
faqs.answer: No. Only publicly accessible creator and post pages are supported.

username.description: Public Kwai username or profile URL for profile and user_posts modes.

post_url.description: Public Kwai /@creator/video/{id} URL for post mode.
